                            | "asset"
                            | "webhook"
                            | "member"
                            | "invitation"
                            | "api_token"
                            | "api_client"
                            | "resource"
                            | "deployment";
                    }[];
                }[];
                next?: string
                | null;
                page: number;
                per_page: number;
                previous?: string | null;
                total: number;
                total_pages: number;
            };

                        | "entry_type"

      AppTheme

      Description

      Schema defining the complete color system for the application's light and dark themes. Includes background, surface, text, border, and accent colors. Actual color values are defined in core/settings/theme.py

          name: string;
          slug?: string | null;
          smartRules?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null;
          sortOrder: number;
      }

    • DebugResponse: { response?: string | null; success: boolean }

      DebugResponse

      Description

      Schema for a standardized response from debugging endpoints.

      Indicates the success status of a debug operation and provides an optional
response message or data string.
      • Optionalresponse?: string | null

        Response

      • success: boolean

        Success

    • EmailInitationResponse: { error?: string | null; success: boolean }

      EmailInitationResponse

      Description

      Schema for the response after attempting to send an email invitation. Indicates success or failure and provides an error message if applicable.

      • Optionalerror?: string | null

        Error

      • success: boolean

        Success

    • EmailInvitation: { email: string; token: string }

      EmailInvitation

      Description

      Schema for the request body when sending an email invitation. Contains the recipient's email and the invitation token string.

      • email: string

        Email

      • token: string

        Token

    • EmailReady: { ready: boolean }

      EmailReady

      Description

      Schema indicating the readiness of the email (SMTP) service.

      • ready: boolean

        Ready

    • EmailSuccess: { error?: string | null; success: boolean }

      EmailSuccess

      Description

      Schema for the response when an email operation (like sending a test email) is attempted. Indicates success or failure and provides an error message if applicable.

      • Optionalerror?: string | null

        Error

      • success: boolean

        Success

    • EmailTemplateCreate: {
          availableVariables?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null;
          buttonText?: string | null;
          customHtml?: string | null;
          description?: string | null;
          enabled: boolean;
          groupId?: string | null;
          headerText?: string | null;
          messageBottom?: string | null;
          messageTop?: string | null;
          name: string;
          subject: string;
          templateType: string;
      }

      EmailTemplateCreate

      Description

      Schema for creating a new email template.

      • OptionalavailableVariables?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null

        Availablevariables

        Description

        Documentation of available variables

      • OptionalbuttonText?: string | null

        Buttontext

        Description

        Button text (structured mode with default.html)

      • OptionalcustomHtml?: string | null

        Customhtml

        Description

        Full custom HTML - if set, overrides structured fields

      • Optionaldescription?: string | null

        Description

        Description

        Description of when this template is used

      • enabled: boolean

        Enabled

        Description

        Whether this template is active

        Default

        true
      • OptionalgroupId?: string | null

        Groupid

        Description

        Workspace ID - null for system-wide templates

      • OptionalheaderText?: string | null

        Headertext

        Description

        Header text (structured mode with default.html)

      • OptionalmessageBottom?: string | null

        Messagebottom

        Description

        Bottom message (structured mode with default.html)

      • OptionalmessageTop?: string | null

        Messagetop

        Description

        Top message (structured mode with default.html)

      • name: string

        Name

        Description

        Human-readable template name

      • subject: string

        Subject

        Description

        Email subject line - supports Jinja2 variables

      • templateType: string

        Templatetype

        Description

        Type of email (invitation, password_reset, notification, test)

          availableVariables: { [key: string]: unknown } | null;

          subject: string;
          templateType: string;

      }

      EntryCreate

      Description

      Schema for creating an entry.

      BREAKING CHANGE: content_markdown removed, replaced with data_json.
Entry content is now schema-driven based on entry_type.schema_json.
      • OptionalassetIds?: string[] | null

        Assetids

      • OptionalcollectionIds?: string[] | null

        Collectionids

      • OptionaldataJson?: { [key: string]: unknown }

        Datajson

        Description

        Schema-driven content data (validated against entry_type.schema_json)

      • Optionaldescription?: string | null

        Description

      • entryTypeId: string

        Entrytypeid Format: uuid4

      • OptionalexpireAt?: string | null

        Expireat

      • OptionalmetadataJson?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null

        Metadatajson

        Description

        Custom non-schema metadata (API keys, external IDs, etc.)

      • OptionalpublishAt?: string | null

        Publishat

      • OptionalpublishedAt?: string | null

        Publishedat

      • OptionalresourceIds?: string[] | null

        Resourceids

      • Optionalslug?: string | null

        Slug

      • status: string

        Status

        Default

        inbox
      • Optionalsummary?: string | null

        Summary

      • title: string

        Title

          title: string;

      EntryTypeRead

      Description

      Schema for reading an entry type.

      System entry types have group_id=None and are globally available to all workspaces.
Workspace-scoped entry types have a specific group_id.
      • Optionalcolor?: string | null

        Color

      • OptionalcreatedAt?: string | null

        Createdat

      • Optionaldescription?: string | null

        Description

      • groupId: string | null

        Groupid

      • Optionalicon?: string | null

        Icon

      • id: string

        Id Format: uuid4

      • isSystem: boolean

        Issystem

      • name: string

        Name

      • OptionalschemaJson?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null

        Schemajson

        Description

        Entry type schema definition (EntryTypeSchemaDefinition)

      • slug: string

        Slug

      • sortOrder: number

        Sortorder

      • OptionalupdateAt?: string | null

        Updateat

        Collection Ids

        Entry Type Id

        Metadatajson

        Publishedat

        Resource Ids

          | "entry_type"
          | "collection"
          | "generic"
          | "user"
          | "workspace"

          | "form"
          | "form_submission"
          | "asset"

          | "member"
          | "invitation"
          | "api_token"
          | "api_client"
          | "resource"
          | "deployment"

      EventDocumentType

      Description

      Enumeration for the type of document or data payload associated with an event. Helps listeners understand the nature of EventDocumentDataBase content.

      Description

      Summary schema for an event log entry (lighter payload).

      • OptionalentityId?: string | null

        Entityid

      • OptionalentityType?: string | null

        Entitytype

      • eventId: string

        Eventid Format: uuid4

      • eventType: string

        Eventtype

      • id: string

        Id Format: uuid4

      • OptionalmessageBody?: string | null

        Messagebody

      • messageTitle: string

        Messagetitle

      • occurredAt: string

        Occurredat Format: date-time

      • OptionaluserId?: string | null

        Userid

      • workspaceId: string

        Workspaceid Format: uuid4

      }

      EventNotifierOptionsSummary

      Description

      Schema for a summary representation of an event notifier option. Extends EventNotifierOptionsRead with a combined option field (namespace.slug).

      • description: string | null

        Description

      • enabled: boolean | null

        Enabled

        Default

        false
      • name: string

        Name

      • option: string

        Option

      • slug: string | null

        Slug

    • ForgotPassword: { email: string }

      ForgotPassword

      Description

      Schema for the "forgot password" request. Requires the user's email address to initiate the password reset process.

      • email: string

        Email

        Id Format: uuid4

      • name: string

        Name

      • Optionalpreferences?:
            | {

                | null;

    • GroupCreate: { name: string }

      GroupCreate

      Description

      Schema for creating a new group. Requires only a name. The name will be stripped of whitespace and must have a minimum length of 1.

      • name: string

        Name

    • GroupEventNotifierCreate: { appriseUrl?: string | null; name: string; options: string[] }

      GroupEventNotifierCreate

      Description

      Schema for creating a new group event notifier. A notifier typically involves a service URL (e.g., Apprise) and a set of event options it should react to.

      Example

      {
               *       "apprise_url": "json://some-service-url/for/notifications",
               *       "name": "My Project Updates Notifier",
               *       "options": [
               *         "core.test-message",
               *         "project.task_completed"
               *       ]
               *     }
      • OptionalappriseUrl?: string | null

        Appriseurl

      • name: string

        Name

      • options: string[]

        Options

        Default

        []
    • GroupEventNotifierOptionsSummary: { option: string }

      GroupEventNotifierOptionsSummary

      Description

      Schema for a summary representation of a group event notifier option. Provides a combined option string (namespace.slug).

      • option: string

        Option

    • GroupEventNotifierPagination: {
          items: {
              enabled: boolean;
              groupId: string;

              name: string;
              options: { option: string }[];
          }[];

          | null;

          previous?: string | null;

    • GroupEventNotifierRead: {
          enabled: boolean;
          groupId: string;
          id: string;
          name: string;
          options: { option: string }[];
      }

      GroupEventNotifierRead

      Description

      Schema for representing a group event notifier when read from the system. Includes its configuration and the list of event options it's subscribed to.

      • enabled: boolean

        Enabled

      • groupId: string

        Groupid Format: uuid4

      • id: string

        Id Format: uuid4

      • name: string

        Name

      • options: { option: string }[]

        Options

        Default

        []
    • GroupEventNotifierUpdate: {
          appriseUrl?: string | null;
          enabled: boolean;
          groupId: string;
          name: string;
          options: string[];
      }

      GroupEventNotifierUpdate

      Description

      Schema for updating an existing group event notifier. Extends GroupEventNotifierSave, implying all fields can be updated, and adds an enabled flag.

      For partial updates (PATCH), individual fields should be `Optional`.
This schema implies a PUT-style update where all fields are provided.

      Example

      {
               *       "apprise_url": "json://some-service-url/for/notifications",
               *       "name": "My Project Updates Notifier",
               *       "options": [
               *         "core.test-message",
               *         "project.task_completed"
               *       ]
               *     }
      • OptionalappriseUrl?: string | null

        Appriseurl

      • enabled: boolean

        Enabled

        Default

        true
      • groupId: string

        Groupid Format: uuid4

      • name: string

        Name

      • options: string[]

        Options

        Default

        []
    • GroupPagination: {
          items: {
              id: string;
              name: string;
              preferences?:
                  | {
                      firstDayOfWeek: number;
                      groupId: string;
                      privateGroup: boolean;
                      siteCanonicalUrl?: string
                      | null;
                      siteContactEmail?: string | null;
                      siteDescription?: string | null;
                      siteFavicon?: string | null;
                      siteLocale: string | null;
                      siteLogo?: string | null;
                      siteMetadataJson?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null;
                      siteSocialJson?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null;
                      siteTagline?: string | null;
                      siteTimezone: string | null;
                      siteTitle?: string | null;
                  }
                  | null;
              slug?: string
              | null;
              users?:
                  | {
                      email?: string
                      | null;
                      fullName?: string | null;
                      groupId: string;
                      id: string;
                      username: string;
                  }[]
                  | null;
              webhooks: {
                  enabled: boolean;
                  groupId: string;
                  id: string;
                  method: "GET"
                  | "POST";
                  name: string;
                  scheduledTime: string;
                  url: string;
                  webhookType:
                      | "entry_type"
                      | "collection"
                      | "generic"
                      | "user"
                      | "workspace"
                      | "entry"
                      | "form"
                      | "form_submission"
                      | "asset"
                      | "webhook"
                      | "member"
                      | "invitation"
                      | "api_token"
                      | "api_client"
                      | "resource"
                      | "deployment";
              }[];
          }[];
          next?: string
          | null;
          page: number;
          per_page: number;
          previous?: string | null;
          total: number;
          total_pages: number;
      }

      GroupPagination

      Description

      Schema for paginated responses containing a list of groups. The items in the list are expected to conform to the GroupRead schema.

      • items: {
            id: string;
            name: string;
            preferences?:
                | {
                    firstDayOfWeek: number;
                    groupId: string;
                    privateGroup: boolean;
                    siteCanonicalUrl?: string
                    | null;
                    siteContactEmail?: string | null;
                    siteDescription?: string | null;
                    siteFavicon?: string | null;
                    siteLocale: string | null;
                    siteLogo?: string | null;
                    siteMetadataJson?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null;
                    siteSocialJson?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null;
                    siteTagline?: string | null;
                    siteTimezone: string | null;
                    siteTitle?: string | null;
                }
                | null;
            slug?: string
            | null;
            users?:
                | {
                    email?: string
                    | null;
                    fullName?: string | null;
                    groupId: string;
                    id: string;
                    username: string;
                }[]
                | null;
            webhooks: {
                enabled: boolean;
                groupId: string;
                id: string;
                method: "GET"
                | "POST";
                name: string;

                    | "entry_type"
                    | "collection"
                    | "generic"
                    | "user"
                    | "workspace"
                    | "entry"
                    | "form"

                    | "asset"
                    | "webhook"
                    | "member"
                    | "invitation"
                    | "api_token"
                    | "api_client"
                    | "resource"
                    | "deployment";
            }[];
        }[]

        Items

      • Optionalnext?: string | null

        Next

      • page: number

        Page

        Default

        1
      • per_page: number

        Per Page

        Default

        10
      • Optionalprevious?: string | null

        Previous

        Total

        Default

        0

      Schema for updating existing group preferences and workspace settings. All fields are optional for partial updates. The id and group_id are set by the controller based on the URL path.

        Groupid

        Id

      GroupRead

      Description

      Schema for representing a group when read from the system, including detailed information. This typically serves as a response model for GET requests. Inherits id, name, and webhooks (as WebhookRead) from GroupUpdate.

      • id: string

        Id Format: uuid4

      • name: string

        Name

      • Optionalpreferences?:
            | {
                firstDayOfWeek: number;
                groupId: string;
                privateGroup: boolean;
                siteCanonicalUrl?: string
                | null;
                siteContactEmail?: string | null;
                siteDescription?: string | null;
                siteFavicon?: string | null;
                siteLocale: string | null;
                siteLogo?: string | null;
                siteMetadataJson?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null;
                siteSocialJson?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null;
                siteTagline?: string | null;
                siteTimezone: string | null;
                siteTitle?: string | null;
            }
            | null
      • Optionalslug?: string | null

        Slug

      • Optionalusers?:
            | {
                email?: string
                | null;
                fullName?: string | null;
                groupId: string;
                id: string;
                username: string;
            }[]
            | null

        Users

      • webhooks: {
            enabled: boolean;
            groupId: string;
            id: string;
            method: "GET" | "POST";
            name: string;
            scheduledTime: string;
            url: string;
            webhookType:
                | "entry_type"
                | "collection"
                | "generic"
                | "user"
                | "workspace"
                | "entry"
                | "form"
                | "form_submission"
                | "asset"
                | "webhook"
                | "member"
                | "invitation"
                | "api_token"
                | "api_client"
                | "resource"
                | "deployment";
        }[]

        Webhooks

        Default

        []
    • HealthCheck: { status: string }

      HealthCheck

      Response model for the health check endpoint. Indicates the operational status of the application.

      }

      • workspaceRole: "OWNER" | "ADMIN" | "EDITOR" | "AUTHOR" | "VIEWER"

      }

        1

        Default

        10
      • Optionalprevious?: string | null

        Previous

      • total: number

        Total

        Default

        0
      • total_pages: number

        Total Pages

        Default

        0

    • LongLiveTokenRead: {
          createdAt?: string | null;
          description?: string | null;
          enabled: boolean;
          id: string;
          integrationId: string;
          lastUsedAt?: string | null;
          name: string;
          revokedAt?: string | null;
          updateAt?: string | null;
          userId: string;
      }

      LongLiveTokenRead

      Description

      Schema for representing a long-lived API token when read from the system. Excludes the sensitive token string itself (never return token_hash). Includes security fields: enabled, last_used_at, revoked_at.

      • OptionalcreatedAt?: string | null

        Createdat

      • Optionaldescription?: string | null

        Description

      • enabled: boolean

        Enabled

      • id: string

        Id Format: uuid4

      • integrationId: string

        Integrationid

        Default

        generic
      • OptionallastUsedAt?: string | null

        Lastusedat

      • name: string

        Name

      • OptionalrevokedAt?: string | null

        Revokedat

      • OptionalupdateAt?: string | null

        Updateat

      • userId: string

        Userid Format: uuid4

    • LongLiveTokenUpdate: { description?: string | null; enabled?: boolean | null; name?: string | null }

      LongLiveTokenUpdate

      Description

      Schema for updating an existing long-lived API token. All fields are optional.

      • Optionaldescription?: string | null

        Description

      • Optionalenabled?: boolean | null

        Enabled

      • Optionalname?: string | null

        Name

    • LongLiveTokenWithToken: {
          createdAt?: string | null;
          description?: string | null;
          enabled: boolean;
          id: string;
          name: string;
          token: string;
          userId: string;
      }

      LongLiveTokenWithToken

      Description

      Schema for the response when a new token is created or rotated. Includes the actual token string, which is shown ONLY ONCE.

      IMPORTANT: The plaintext token is never stored in the database.
Only the bcrypt hash is stored.
      • OptionalcreatedAt?: string | null

        Createdat

      • Optionaldescription?: string | null

        Description

      • enabled: boolean

        Enabled

      • id: string

        Id Format: uuid4

      • name: string

        Name

      • token: string

        Token

      • userId: string

        Userid Format: uuid4

    • MaintenanceStorageDetails: {
          backupsDirSize: string;
          pluginDirSize: string;
          seedsDirSize: string;
          tempDirSize: string;
      }

      MaintenanceStorageDetails

      Description

      Schema providing detailed storage usage for various key application directories. All sizes are presented as human-readable strings.

      • backupsDirSize: string

        Backupsdirsize

      • pluginDirSize: string

        Plugindirsize

      • seedsDirSize: string

        Seedsdirsize

      • tempDirSize: string

        Tempdirsize

    • MaintenanceSummary: { dataDirSize: string }

      MaintenanceSummary

      Description

      Schema for a summary of maintenance information, currently focused on data directory size.

      • dataDirSize: string

        Datadirsize

        Default

        bearer

      Enumeration for specifying how NULL values should be positioned in ordered results.

    • OrderDirection: "asc" | "desc"

      Enumeration for specifying the direction of ordering in queries.

    • PasswordResetToken: { email: string; token: string }

      PasswordResetToken

      Description

      Schema representing a password reset token along with the associated email. This might be used when returning token information or in contexts where both email and token are relevant.

      • email: string

        Email

      • token: string

        Token

    • PlatformRole: "NONE" | "SUPER_ADMIN"

      PlatformRole

      Description

      Platform-level roles for Marvin.

      A user has ONE platform role that determines their platform-level access.
Platform roles are independent of workspace membership.

          altText?: string | null;

          slug: string;
          width?: number | null;
      }

      Description

      Schema for published assets in the publishing API.

      Provides asset metadata for external sites to build proper media tags.
Read-only, does not expose internal fields like storage_key or uploaded_by.

        Assettype

      }

      PublishedEntryRead

      Description

      Schema for published entries in the publishing API.

      Only includes public-facing fields. Excludes all admin metadata,
internal fields, and user information.

BREAKING CHANGE: content_markdown removed, replaced with data.
Entry content is now schema-driven based on entry_type.schema_json.

            altText?: string | null;
            assetType: string;

      Description

      • enabled: boolean

        Enabled

        Default

        true

        Name

    • SiteConfiguration: {
          canonicalUrl?: string | null;
          contactEmail?: string | null;
          description?: string | null;
          favicon?: string | null;
          locale: string;
          logo?: string | null;
          metadataJson?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null;
          social?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null;
          tagline?: string | null;
          timezone: string;
          title?: string | null;
      }

      SiteConfiguration

      Description

      Site configuration for publishing API.

      Provides the public identity and settings for a workspace's published site.
This replaces hardcoded site.ts files in Astro projects.
      • OptionalcanonicalUrl?: string | null

        Canonicalurl

      • OptionalcontactEmail?: string | null

        Contactemail

      • Optionaldescription?: string | null

        Description

      • Optionalfavicon?: string | null

        Favicon

      • locale: string

        Locale

        Default

        en-US
      • Optionallogo?: string | null

        Logo

      • OptionalmetadataJson?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null

        Metadatajson

      • Optionalsocial?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null

        Social

      • Optionaltagline?: string | null

        Tagline

      • timezone: string

        Timezone

        Default

        America/New_York
      • Optionaltitle?: string | null

        Title

    • SuccessResponse: { error: boolean; message: string }

      SuccessResponse

      Description

      Standardized schema for generic API success responses. Provides a success message and an error flag set to False.

      • error: boolean

        Error

        Default

        false
      • message: string

        Message

    • TokenResponseDelete: { tokenDelete: string }

      TokenResponseDelete

      Description

      Schema for the response after successfully deleting an API token. Confirms which token was deleted by its name.

      • tokenDelete: string

        Tokendelete

    • UnlockResults: { unlocked: number }

      UnlockResults

      Description

      Schema for the response when an operation to unlock user accounts is performed. Indicates how many user accounts were successfully unlocked.

      • unlocked: number

        Unlocked

        Default

        0
    • UserCreate: {
          admin: boolean;
          advanced: boolean;
          authMethod: "MARVIN" | "LDAP" | "OIDC";
          canInvite: boolean;
          canManage: boolean;
          canOrganize: boolean;
          email: string;
          fullName?: string | null;
          group?: string | null;
          id?: string | null;
          isSuperuser: boolean;
          password: string;
          platformRole: "NONE" | "SUPER_ADMIN";
          username?: string | null;
      }

      UserCreate

      Description

      Schema for creating a new user. Includes essential user details, authentication method, admin status, group assignment, permissions, and password.

      Example

      {
               *       "admin": false,
               *       "email": "newuser@example.com",
               *       "fullName": "New User Name",
               *       "group": "Default",
               *       "password": "aSecurePassword123",
               *       "username": "NewUser"
               *     }
      • admin: boolean

        Admin

        Default

        false
      • advanced: boolean

        Advanced

        Default

        false
      • authMethod: "MARVIN" | "LDAP" | "OIDC"

        Default

        MARVIN
      • canInvite: boolean

        Caninvite

        Default

        false
      • canManage: boolean

        Canmanage

        Default

        false
      • canOrganize: boolean

        Canorganize

        Default

        false
      • email: string

        Email

      • OptionalfullName?: string | null

        Fullname

      • Optionalgroup?: string | null

        Group

      • Optionalid?: string | null

        Id

      • isSuperuser: boolean

        Issuperuser

        Default

        false
      • password: string

        Password

      • platformRole: "NONE" | "SUPER_ADMIN"

        Default

        NONE
      • Optionalusername?: string | null

        Username

    • UserPagination: {
          items: {
              activeGroupId?: string | null;
              admin: boolean;
              advanced: boolean;
              authMethod: "MARVIN" | "LDAP" | "OIDC";
              cacheKey: string | null;
              canInvite: boolean;
              canManage: boolean;
              canOrganize: boolean;
              email: string;
              fullName?: string | null;
              group: string;
              groupId: string;
              groupSlug: string;
              id: string;
              isSuperuser: boolean;
              password: string;
              platformRole: "NONE" | "SUPER_ADMIN";
              username?: string | null;
              workspaceMemberships: {
                  groupId: string;
                  workspaceRole: "OWNER" | "ADMIN" | "EDITOR" | "AUTHOR" | "VIEWER";
              }[];
          }[];
          next?: string
          | null;
          page: number;
          per_page: number;
          previous?: string | null;
          total: number;
          total_pages: number;
      }

      UserPagination

      Description

      Schema for paginated responses containing a list of users. Items are expected to conform to the UserRead schema.

      • items: {
            activeGroupId?: string | null;
            admin: boolean;
            advanced: boolean;
            authMethod: "MARVIN" | "LDAP" | "OIDC";
            cacheKey: string | null;
            canInvite: boolean;
            canManage: boolean;
            canOrganize: boolean;
            email: string;
            fullName?: string | null;
            group: string;
            groupId: string;
            groupSlug: string;
            id: string;
            isSuperuser: boolean;
            password: string;
            platformRole: "NONE" | "SUPER_ADMIN";
            username?: string | null;
            workspaceMemberships: {
                groupId: string;
                workspaceRole: "OWNER" | "ADMIN" | "EDITOR" | "AUTHOR" | "VIEWER";
            }[];
        }[]

        Items

      • Optionalnext?: string | null

        Next

      • page: number

        Page

        Default

        1
      • per_page: number

        Per Page

        Default

        10
      • Optionalprevious?: string | null

        Previous

      • total: number

        Total

        Default

        0
      • total_pages: number

        Total Pages

        Default

        0
    • UserProfileUpdate: { email?: string | null; fullName?: string | null; username?: string | null }

      UserProfileUpdate

      Description

      Schema for updating a user's profile information (without password). All fields are optional for partial updates. Used by the /api/self endpoint for users updating their own profile.

      • Optionalemail?: string | null

        Email

      • OptionalfullName?: string | null

        Fullname

      • Optionalusername?: string | null

        Username

    • UserRead: {
          activeGroupId?: string | null;
          admin: boolean;
          advanced: boolean;
          authMethod: "MARVIN" | "LDAP" | "OIDC";
          cacheKey: string | null;
          canInvite: boolean;
          canManage: boolean;
          canOrganize: boolean;
          email: string;
          fullName?: string | null;
          group: string;
          groupId: string;
          groupSlug: string;
          id: string;
          isSuperuser: boolean;
          password: string;
          platformRole: "NONE" | "SUPER_ADMIN";
          username?: string | null;
          workspaceMemberships: {
              groupId: string;
              workspaceRole: "OWNER" | "ADMIN" | "EDITOR" | "AUTHOR" | "VIEWER";
          }[];
      }

      UserRead

      Description

      Schema for representing a user when read from the system. Extends UserCreate (which includes password), and adds system-generated fields like id, group details, and cache_key.

      NOTE: Inheriting from `UserCreate` means this schema will include `password`.
For public user representations, `password` should typically be excluded.
Consider having a different base or explicitly excluding password here if this
is for general-purpose reading. `PrivateUser` below handles sensitive data.

      Example

      {
               *       "admin": false,
               *       "email": "newuser@example.com",
               *       "fullName": "New User Name",
               *       "group": "Default",
               *       "password": "aSecurePassword123",
               *       "username": "NewUser"
               *     }
      • OptionalactiveGroupId?: string | null

        Activegroupid

      • admin: boolean

        Admin

        Default

        false
      • advanced: boolean

        Advanced

        Default

        false
      • authMethod: "MARVIN" | "LDAP" | "OIDC"

        Default

        MARVIN
      • cacheKey: string | null

        Cachekey

      • canInvite: boolean

        Caninvite

        Default

        false
      • canManage: boolean

        Canmanage

        Default

        false
      • canOrganize: boolean

        Canorganize

        Default

        false
      • email: string

        Email

      • OptionalfullName?: string | null

        Fullname

      • group: string

        Group

      • groupId: string

        Groupid Format: uuid4

      • groupSlug: string

        Groupslug

      • id: string

        Id Format: uuid4

      • isSuperuser: boolean

        Issuperuser

        Default

        false
      • password: string

        Password

      • platformRole: "NONE" | "SUPER_ADMIN"
      • Optionalusername?: string | null

        Username

      • workspaceMemberships: {
            groupId: string;
            workspaceRole: "OWNER" | "ADMIN" | "EDITOR" | "AUTHOR" | "VIEWER";
        }[]

        Workspacememberships

        Default

        []

          private: boolean;

      }

        Fullname

      • groupId: string

    • UserUpdate: {
          admin: boolean;
          advanced: boolean;
          authMethod: "MARVIN" | "LDAP" | "OIDC";
          canInvite: boolean;
          canManage: boolean;
          canOrganize: boolean;
          email: string;
          fullName: string;
          group?: string | null;
          id?: string | null;
          isSuperuser: boolean;
          password: string;
          platformRole: "NONE" | "SUPER_ADMIN";
          username: string;
      }

      UserUpdate

      Description

      Schema likely used internally for saving a user to the database, ensuring required fields like username, full_name, and password are present. Extends UserCreate.

      Example

      {
               *       "admin": false,
               *       "email": "newuser@example.com",
               *       "fullName": "New User Name",
               *       "group": "Default",
               *       "password": "aSecurePassword123",
               *       "username": "NewUser"
               *     }
      • admin: boolean

        Admin

        Default

        false
      • advanced: boolean

        Advanced

        Default

        false
      • authMethod: "MARVIN" | "LDAP" | "OIDC"

        Default

        MARVIN
      • canInvite: boolean

        Caninvite

        Default

        false
      • canManage: boolean

        Canmanage

        Default

        false
      • canOrganize: boolean

        Canorganize

        Default

        false
      • email: string

        Email

      • fullName: string

        Fullname

      • Optionalgroup?: string | null

        Group

      • Optionalid?: string | null

        Id

      • isSuperuser: boolean

        Issuperuser

        Default

        false
      • password: string

        Password

      • platformRole: "NONE" | "SUPER_ADMIN"

        Default

        NONE
      • username: string

        Username

    • ValidationError: { loc: (string | number)[]; msg: string; type: string }

      ValidationError

      • loc: (string | number)[]

        Location

      • msg: string

        Message

      • type: string

        Error Type

    • WebhookCreate: {
          enabled: boolean;
          method: "GET" | "POST";
          name: string;
          scheduledTime: string;
          url: string;
          webhookType:
              | "entry_type"
              | "collection"
              | "generic"
              | "user"
              | "workspace"
              | "entry"
              | "form"
              | "form_submission"
              | "asset"
              | "webhook"
              | "member"
              | "invitation"
              | "api_token"
              | "api_client"
              | "resource"
              | "deployment";
      }

      WebhookCreate

      Description

      Schema for creating a new webhook configuration. Includes fields for enabling the webhook, naming it, specifying the target URL, HTTP method, type, and an optional scheduled time for execution.

      • enabled: boolean

        Enabled

        Default

        true
      • method: "GET" | "POST"

        Default

        POST
      • name: string

        Name

      • scheduledTime: string

        Scheduledtime Format: date-time

      • url: string

        Url Format: uri

      • webhookType:
            | "entry_type"
            | "collection"
            | "generic"
            | "user"
            | "workspace"
            | "entry"
            | "form"
            | "form_submission"
            | "asset"
            | "webhook"
            | "member"
            | "invitation"
            | "api_token"
            | "api_client"
            | "resource"
            | "deployment"

        Default

        generic
    • WebhookMethod: "GET" | "POST"

      WebhookMethod

      Description

      Enumeration for HTTP methods supported by webhooks.

          items: {

      Schema for paginated responses containing a list of webhook configurations.

            enabled: boolean;

      • per_page: number

        Default

      • Optionalprevious?: string | null

        Total

        Default

        0

          enabled: boolean;

          id: string;

      WebhookRead

      Description

      Schema for representing a webhook configuration when read from the system. Extends WebhookUpdate by adding the unique id of the webhook.

      • enabled: boolean

        Enabled

        Default

        true
      • groupId: string

        Groupid Format: uuid4

      • id: string

        Id Format: uuid4

      • method: "GET" | "POST"

        Default

        POST
      • name: string

        Name

      • scheduledTime: string

        Scheduledtime Format: date-time

      • url: string

        Url Format: uri

      • webhookType:
            | "entry_type"
            | "collection"
            | "generic"
            | "user"
            | "workspace"
            | "entry"
            | "form"
            | "form_submission"
            | "asset"
            | "webhook"
            | "member"
            | "invitation"
            | "api_token"
            | "api_client"
            | "resource"
            | "deployment"

        Default

      Used when a workspace admin wants to invite a user to their workspace.

          groupId: string;
          id: string;
          user?:
              | {
                  email?: string
                  | null;
                  fullName?: string | null;
                  groupId: string;
                  id: string;
                  username: string;
              }
              | null;
          userId: string;
          workspaceRole: "OWNER"
          | "ADMIN"
          | "EDITOR"
          | "AUTHOR"
          | "VIEWER";
      }

      WorkspaceMembershipRead

      Description

      Schema for reading a user's workspace membership with role. Represents the relationship between a user and a workspace. Includes user details when loaded with joinedload.

      • groupId: string

        Groupid Format: uuid4

      • id: string

        Id Format: uuid4

      • Optionaluser?:
            | {
                email?: string
                | null;
                fullName?: string | null;
                groupId: string;
                id: string;
                username: string;
            }
            | null
      • userId: string

        Userid Format: uuid4

      • workspaceRole: "OWNER" | "ADMIN" | "EDITOR" | "AUTHOR" | "VIEWER"
    • WorkspaceMembershipSummary: {
          groupId: string;
          workspaceRole: "OWNER" | "ADMIN" | "EDITOR" | "AUTHOR" | "VIEWER";
      }

      WorkspaceMembershipSummary

      Description

      Schema for summarized workspace membership information. Used in user profiles to show which workspaces they belong to.

      • groupId: string

        Groupid Format: uuid4

      • workspaceRole: "OWNER" | "ADMIN" | "EDITOR" | "AUTHOR" | "VIEWER"
    • WorkspaceMemberUpdate: { workspaceRole: "OWNER" | "ADMIN" | "EDITOR" | "AUTHOR" | "VIEWER" }

      WorkspaceMemberUpdate

      Description

      Schema for updating a workspace member's role.

      Used when changing a user's permissions within a workspace.
    • WorkspaceRole: "OWNER" | "ADMIN" | "EDITOR" | "AUTHOR" | "VIEWER"

      WorkspaceRole

      Description

      Workspace-level roles for workspace members.

      Each user-workspace membership has ONE workspace role that determines
what they can do within that specific workspace.
    • WorkspaceSiteInfo: {
          site: {
              canonicalUrl?: string | null;

              social?: { [key: string]: unknown } | null;
              tagline?: string | null;
              timezone: string;
              title?: string | null;
          };
          workspace: { name: string; slug: string };
      }

      WorkspaceSiteInfo

      Description

      Combined workspace and site configuration response.

      Returns everything an external site needs to initialize itself.

            canonicalUrl?: string | null;
            contactEmail?: string | null;
